name: proofmeta
description: ProofMeta monorepo — protocol specs, SDK, reference resolvers, demos

scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @proofmeta/sdk-ts --if-present && npm run test -w @proofmeta/cli --if-present && npm run test -w @proofmeta/example-provider --if-present && node scripts/e2e.mjs
